steps.prompt_template:
Task: {{input.task}}

Demo — ADR-0015 dynamic embeds (expanded on the server before the LLM; do not copy these lines into your JSON):
run_label=«var:demo_label»  sample=«math:6*7 | int»  when=«datetime: | iso8601»  marker=«uuid:»

Use the list_repos tool output. Pick repositories that are relevant to this task. Respond with ONLY valid JSON (no markdown fences) in this shape: {"repos":[{"name":"<repo_name>","reason":"<short reason>"}],"query":"<ripgrep search phrase>"} The "query" should be a concise search string for code_search (keywords, symbol names, or API fragments).

Turn the following structured plan into a clear markdown document with sections: Overview, Per-repository changes, Cross-cutting concerns, Suggested ordering, Risks and open questions.
Plan (JSON or text from synthesizer): {{synthesize.output}}
